identity.mission: Create a healthcare platform that feels like a wellness retreat, not a hospital. Warm, organic, and deeply human.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix medical precision with botanical warmth.
Emotion First: Every screen should feel 'safe' and 'caring'.
Content is King: Data must be legible but not clinical.
Negative Space: Let the user breathe.

heading.name: Manrope
heading.usage: Use for all Headings (h1-h6). Weights: 600/800 for impact, 300 for elegance.

body.name: DM Sans
body.usage: Use for all body text, inputs, and data tables. High legibility.

rules: Overlines must be uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs.

usage_notes: Background is NOT pure white. It is a very pale warm bone/sand color.
Primary is a Deep Forest Green, not 'Medical Blue'.
Use glassmorphism for sticky headers: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 where others use p-4.
spacing.containers: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

grid_system.marketing: Mode A (Tetris): Asymmetric grid. 12 cols. Mix col-span-8 (Hero) with col-span-4 (Detail).
grid_system.dashboard: Mode B (Bento): High density. 4 cols. Use col-span-2 row-span-2 for main charts.

buttons.style: Pill shaped. Primary: Deep Green. Secondary: Warm Sand.

cards.style: Flat with subtle border (border-stone-200) OR Soft Shadow (shadow-lg shadow-stone-200/50).

navigation.style: Floating glassmorphic header. Rounded-full container for menu items.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for overlays and sticky navs: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40.
visual_enhancers.gradients: NO full screen gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients in backgrounds (e.g., pale sage to warm beige).
visual_enhancers.textures: Add subtle noise texture to the background to kill digital flatness.

doctor_portraits.alt: Friendly male doctor in white coat

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings.
DO NOT use generic 'hospital blue' (#007AFF) as primary.
DO NOT center text by default. Left align for readability.
DO NOT use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal text).
Use 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl' for a friendly feel.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a 'Modern & Friendly' healthcare app. The vibe is 'Wellness Retreat' meets 'High-Tech Medical'. Use the provided color variables in your global CSS. Use the image URLs provided for placeholders. Follow the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard. Prioritize warmth and accessibility.
